Name: FE_HP_ST_GUAGE_SETTING_PARAM
Description: Controls front-end HP and stamina gauge behavior, including depletion speed, animation timing, and UI sizing based on stats.

Fields.Name: HP Decrease Rate
Fields.Description: Controls the rate at which the HP gauge decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease Rate
Fields.Description: Controls the rate at which the stamina gauge decreases.

Fields.Name: HP Decrease Animation Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold at which HP decrease animation begins.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease Animation Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold at which stamina decrease animation begins.

Fields.Name: HP Decrease Animation Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before HP decrease animation starts.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease Animation Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before stamina decrease animation starts.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Decrease Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly enemy HP gauge decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Decrease Animation Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold for triggering enemy HP decrease animation.

Fields.Name: Enemy HP Decrease Animation Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before enemy HP decrease animation begins.

Fields.Name: Minimum HP Gauge Size
Fields.Description: Minimum visual length of the HP gauge at lowest stats.

Fields.Name: Minimum Stamina Gauge Size
Fields.Description: Minimum visual length of the stamina gauge at lowest stats.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP Gauge Size
Fields.Description: Maximum visual length of the HP gauge at highest stats.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stamina Gauge Size
Fields.Description: Maximum visual length of the stamina gauge at highest stats.
